measurement_notes.rocq_coq_files: Count of tracked `.v` files in the private repo.
measurement_notes.verus_files: Count of tracked Rust files under `proofs/verus/` in the private repo.
measurement_notes.lean4_files: Count of tracked `.lean` files in the private repo.
measurement_notes.fstar_files: Count of tracked `.fst` and `.fsti` files in the private repo.
measurement_notes.kani_harness_files: Count of tracked Rust files containing at least one `kani::proof` annotation.
measurement_notes.kani_proof_annotations: Total `kani::proof` annotation count across the tracked private Rust tree.
